name: session_mixup_repro
description: Designed to expose the cross-lane session id swap on the same agent. Each agent runs two lanes in parallel — the syscollector lane sends a Start with size=731 from the windows full dump, and the FIM lane sends a Start with size=27726 from windows11_fim_first_sync. With several agents racing concurrently the manager will process these two Starts in arbitrary order and reply out of FIFO order; the agent-side dispatcher must match each StartAck to the right pending Source by module tag, otherwise FIM items (seq up to 27725) get sent under the syscollector session (declared size 731) and the manager rejects them with 'sequence number ... exceeds declared size'.
